tutorial: Hey kid. I'm Lucian Jr. My dad runs things. I run little things. You wanna run a little thing? Easy money. Just a quick hit on one of Whiskers's runners. He won't even notice.
Okay listen. Whiskers has a stash. You go get a piece of it. Don't think too hard about it. This is how everyone starts.
whiskers: Bailey's runner moves Mythics through the docks at dawn. End his shift.
Wilson is hosting a private auction tonight. The eGirls he's bidding on shouldn't make it to the room.
Lalo's accountant keeps a ledger of who owes what. The ledger needs to disappear.
There's a shipment crossing the bay. I want what's in the crates. I don't want what's guarding them.
lucian_jr: yo my dad doesn't know I'm doing this but Whiskers has a stash and I want it
Sofia thinks she's hot stuff. Her girls don't need to think that anymore.
Jinx owes me. Make her pay it or take what she has.
jinx: bro wilson's been sitting on this stash forever you wanna go get it lmao
sofia threw shade at me last week. take a couple of her rares as a vibe check
this isn't even risky for you tbh just walk in there
jeremy: Bailey's bagman makes the rounds at the same hour every Tuesday. Pure coin, no cats.
There's a courier with a satchel. The satchel goes in the river. The contents come to me.
lucian_sr: {target} has forgotten who built this family. Remind them.
I have a long memory. {target} has a short one. Adjust the balance.
sofia: Mythics in a vault. The vault is mine if you can get in. Half what you bring out is yours.
There's a kennel of rares I want. Bring them home alive — well, you know what I mean.

narrative_pools_big_score: I've been waiting to ask you this since I met you. Wilson's eGirl vault. I tried in '08. You're the one who's going to do it for me.

success: we got the thing i think
near_miss: half of us are home. that's fine right
total_failure: tell my owner i did my best
tell my mother i was good
i hope they remember me kindly
tell the others to be careful out there

near_miss: I told you to bring more Mythics
total_failure: this isn't how i pictured it ending
tell whiskers i won't be in tomorrow

success: i bit a guy. it was awesome.
near_miss: half of us became spiders!! the rest of us are FINE
i don't remember most of it tbh
total_failure: i went down screaming and i'd do it again
tell the bees i love them

success: owner will be proud i think
near_miss: where are the other kitties going
total_failure: i was supposed to be in bed
an EPIC end befitting an EPIC hero
tell the bards to write a sad one

success: the impostor was the bag the whole time
i KNEW that vent was rigged
near_miss: i saw who tipped them off. it was YOU
vote them out. all of them.

success: Honor preserved. The crew rides on.
We did as we said we would.
near_miss: I would do it again. So would they.
We honor the lost by living well.
total_failure: It was a good ending. A worthy one.
Save your tears for those who need them.

success: 🎵 never gonna give that mark up 🎵
🎵 we just rolled them, didn't we 🎵
near_miss: 🎵 we know the game and we're gonna play it 🎵
🎵 inside we both know what's been happening 🎵
total_failure: 🎵 i just wanted to tell you how i'm feeling 🎵
ereh ma I yhw wonk t'nod I

success: the operation went exactly as I projected.
near_miss: below my projections, but not catastrophic.
total_failure: the variables were not as advertised.

success: i told you that fence was sketchy. it was. but we got the take anyway.
luck. all luck. we are not built for this.
near_miss: of course we lost half. it's us. what did you think.

success: Another tale to add to the chronicles.
near_miss: The price of legend is steep.
We carry the lost with us.
total_failure: Even legends fall. Sing them well.

success: I FORGED THIS NIGHT WITH MY OWN PAWS
THE HEAVENS WILL HEAR OF IT
total_failure: I FELL AS I LIVED — LOUDLY

near_miss: half the c̴r̴e̴w̴ came home. half.

success: A clean operation. The variables aligned.
near_miss: Outliers in the data. Regrettable but informative.
Half our test subjects did not return.
total_failure: An object lesson in respecting the variance.
My findings will not be published.

near_miss: A trial. We are not unscathed.

success: omg that was so fun bestie 💅
near_miss: ok that was rough but we're literally fine bestie 💔
girlies didn't all make it but we vibing
total_failure: rip babes i never even got to post 💀

Sus: i told you that guy was a fed
i CALLED IT. he was sus.
Trash: this is just how it ends for us

Sus: i bet they were impostors too
Mythic: TWO CREWS DARE THE SAME NIGHT — ONE LEAVES.

Sus: TOLD YOU not to trust them
Professor: An interesting data point on offerer trustworthiness.

Brave: The Boss themself. So be it.

Trash: of course there was a snitch
the cats weren't even there. of course.

Brave: We were seen. So be it.
Sus: did you see that guy?? imPOSTOR for sure

Professor: A loose variable. We will resolve it next iteration.
Trash: of course we left a thread loose

lucian_jr: {player} accepted a job from **Lucian Jr**. lmao good luck
**Lucian Jr** slid {player} a folder. dad's not gonna know about this one.
{player} took **Lucian Jr** up on his offer.
jinx: {player} signed up for a job with **Jinx**. low heat, vibes only.
**Jinx** found {player} a job. it's chill she swears.
jeremy: {player} took **Jeremy**'s job — pure coin, no questions.
{player} is doing the laundry for **Jeremy** tonight.
lucian_sr: **Lucian Sr** has named {player} as the vendetta carrier.
{player} accepted **Lucian Sr**'s task. the family remembers.
{player} is settling a score for **Lucian Sr**.
sofia: **Sofia** has selected {player} for one of her jobs.
{player} is doing a job for **Sofia**. cats and coins on the line.
**Sofia** brought {player} into her parlor. business follows.

accept_announcements_big_score: {player} just accepted **The Big Score**. The eGirl vault. Wilson, no idea what's coming.
**Whiskers** has finally found someone for the heist he tried in '08: {player}.
{player} is going for **The Big Score**. The whole hideout went quiet.

success: {player}'s crew got it done. **{npc}** is pleased.
Clean work for **{npc}**. {player}'s crew came home with the take.
Job's done. {player} is back at the hideout.
near_miss: {player}'s crew came home short — **{casualties}** cats didn't make it. {npc}'s take walked.
Half a crew is better than none. {player}'s smaller team is back.
{player}'s crew got out, but **{casualties}** cats didn't. The job's a wash.
total_failure: **{npc}**'s job is dust. {player}'s crew is gone — **{casualties}** cats lost.
{player} sent a crew. {player} did not get one back.
Total wipe. **{casualties}** of {player}'s cats are in the bay now.

cat_police_raid: Sirens. Lots of them. The crew runs but the heat clings.
Cat Police were a block ahead the whole time. You barely make it back to the hideout.
Someone tipped off the precinct. The papers will run this tomorrow.
rival_crew: A second crew is already on the mark. You have to push through them to get anywhere.
Halfway through, you find out you weren't the only operator hired tonight.
Another outfit's runners block the alley. They didn't expect you either.
double_cross: Half the haul never makes it back. The offerer's people have light fingers.
When the cats come home, some of them are already 'reassigned'.
You count the take twice. It still comes out short.
boss_arrives: Then *they* show up. Personally. The job just got harder.
The target's boss isn't supposed to be here tonight. They are.
An unmarked car. A familiar silhouette. The room recalibrates.
informant: Someone in the crew was wearing a wire. You realize this far too late.
The mark knew you were coming. They were just polite about it.
It was a setup. Not a great one, but enough.
easy_mark: The mark wasn't paying attention. Nobody was. You walk out with everything.
A door was unlocked that shouldn't have been. The take is double.
Sometimes the job just goes right. The take comes home heavy.
found_a_stash: On the way out, one of the crew kicks open a cabinet you weren't told about.
A side stash the mark didn't know was missing. You take it too.
There's an extra crate by the door. It's yours now.
sloppy_target: The mark had keys to a *different* stash. You take that instead.
The cats they were guarding turn out to be the wrong cats. The container, though…
You leave with a sealed pack instead of the cats. Worth more, maybe.
witness: Someone saw the crew leave. They'll talk. The next job will be harder.
A doorman makes eye contact. They didn't move. They didn't have to.
The neighborhood is awake now. Word travels.
loose_end: You leave a thread loose. The Cat Police will pick at it.
A cat got separated. They'll find their way home, but not before someone asks questions.
Something small went wrong. It'll cost you on the next run.

double_cat.name: Double Cat
double_cat.desc: Every catch counts twice while the perk is active.

rarity_bump.name: Rarity Bump
rarity_bump.desc: Catches have a chance to upgrade one rarity tier (capped at Mythic).

catch_xp_boost.name: XP Hustle
catch_xp_boost.desc: Catch-quest XP is multiplied while active.

pack_drop_boost.name: Crate Sniffer
pack_drop_boost.desc: Bonus-pack drop rate on every catch is multiplied.

streak_protector.name: Streak Saver
streak_protector.desc: Daily catch streak survives one skipped day while active.

roulette_luck.name: Loaded Wheel
roulette_luck.desc: Small chance roulette spins land in your favor.

roulette_mercy.name: House Mercy
roulette_mercy.desc: Refunds a portion of losing roulette bets.

free_spin.name: Free Spin
free_spin.desc: One roulette bet up to the cap is fully refunded if it loses.

stock_dividend_boost.name: Insider Tip
stock_dividend_boost.desc: Bonus coins on top of stock reward payouts.

cat_rain_coin_yield.name: Cloudburst Wages
cat_rain_coin_yield.desc: Earns coins per cat caught during a rain.

pack_tier_upgrade.name: Crate Polish
pack_tier_upgrade.desc: Your next pack open is bumped up one tier (cap Silver).

pack_bonus_cat.name: Padded Crate
pack_bonus_cat.desc: Pack opens grant +1 extra random cat while active.

pack_floor.name: No Fines
pack_floor.desc: Your next pack's lowest possible cat is Nice (no Fines).

free_pack.name: Comped Crate
free_pack.desc: A pack lands in your inventory immediately on grant.

complication_insurance.name: Sweep Pattern
complication_insurance.desc: Lowers complication chance on your next commit.

crew_insurance.name: Crew Insurance
crew_insurance.desc: Converts your next near-miss into a clean success.

daily_cap_extension.name: Overtime
daily_cap_extension.desc: Adds one extra job commit to today's limit.

send_power_boost.name: Iron Grip
send_power_boost.desc: Inflates your next commit's effective Send Power.

rep_windfall.name: Rep Windfall
rep_windfall.desc: Doubles offerer rep gain on your next successful job.

catnip_extension.name: Catnip Extension
catnip_extension.desc: Adds time to your active catnip session.

perk_amplifier.name: Perk Amplifier
perk_amplifier.desc: Boosts your active catnip perks' effect by a multiplier.

bounty_refresh.name: Bounty Refresh
bounty_refresh.desc: Re-rolls your current bounty board on grant.

bounty_boost.name: Bounty Boost
bounty_boost.desc: Bounty progress ticks faster while active.

trade_fee_waiver.name: Trade Waiver
trade_fee_waiver.desc: Waives any fee on your next few trades.

quest_xp_boost.name: Quest Hustle
quest_xp_boost.desc: BP quest XP is multiplied while active.

free_define.name: Open Dictionary
free_define.desc: Auto-progresses your define misc quest if active.

discovery_shortcut.name: Shortcut
discovery_shortcut.desc: Adds one random unlearned rarity to your /catstore discoveries.

reroll_board.name: Reroll Board
reroll_board.desc: One free re-roll of the job offer board.
